title: Fix react-hooks/rules-of-hooks violations in teacher_responsibility page
description: 9 conditional hook calls flagged by lint at src/app/.../teacher_responsibility/page.tsx lines 125-285. Conditional hooks corrupt React state across renders. Lint warns but does not block. P0 because violations sit in user-facing teacher responsibility flow. Action: refactor to call all hooks unconditionally at top, move conditional logic into hook bodies or render guards.
close_reason: Split into ClassroomResponsibilityPage wrapper + ClassroomResponsibility child. 11 rules-of-hooks warnings eliminated. Lint 35→25 warnings, typecheck clean, 733/733 tests pass. Commit 9beddac6.

title: Remove 'as any' on Prisma groupBy in assign + dashboard repos
description: Two live-code type escapes bypass Prisma type safety: src/features/assign/infrastructure/repositories/assign.repository.ts:106 and src/features/dashboard/infrastructure/repositories/dashboard.repository.ts:351 both cast prisma.<table> as any to call .groupBy(). Brittle against Prisma upgrades. Action: investigate why typed groupBy fails (missing select? Prisma client regen needed?), fix root cause, drop casts.
close_reason: Dropped (prisma.model as any).groupBy() in both repos. Root cause: as T[] result cast triggered backward inference through Prisma InputErrors conditional type. Fix: fully inferred return type, removed unused local type aliases.

title: Decide fate of 2 stranded WIP auth-migration stashes
description: Two large stashes stuck on stale base commits (0e9451b, fa95b33). Both contain ~12k LOC churn: Better Auth migration, AGENTS.md rewrite, schema.prisma changes, password migration scripts, proxy.ts.old. Risk: stashes rot against current main; conflicts compound daily. Action: review each, land partial work as PRs or drop with note. stash@{0}=editable table+teacher CRUD+E2E. stash@{1}=subject credit type guards + auth migration.
close_reason: Dropped stash@{0} (auth migration superseded, Better Auth already live). Dropped stash@{1} (subject credit + mgmt pages on stale base). Salvaged credit-titles.ts mapped type fix before dropping.

title: Review 8 playwright failure artifacts from Apr 21
description: playwright-report/ contains 8 failure .md artifacts + 6 screenshots dated 2026-04-21, unreviewed. Either real regressions or flakes. Action: open report, classify each, file follow-up bugs for real failures, document flake pattern if flake. Coverage stale: coverage/ dir last modified 2026-02-27.
close_reason: Reviewed all 8 failures. No code regressions. Root causes: 3× server-not-running (60s goto timeout), 2× storageState expired/auth.setup skipped, 2× missing seed data for 2567/1, 1× slow-render flake. Tests need: dev server + pnpm db:seed:clean + auth.setup.ts to pass.

title: Triage 30+ skipped E2E specs (lock, pii, admin-regressions)
description: Skipped tests block validation coverage. Files: e2e/10-program-subject-assignment.spec.ts (3), 13-bulk-lock.spec.ts (5), 14-lock-templates.spec.ts (7), 14-security-pii-exposure.spec.ts (2), 16-publish-gate.spec.ts, 17-all-timeslot-ux.spec.ts, 18-admin-regressions.spec.ts (6 conditional). Action: per-suite triage — fix and unskip, or delete with reason. Currently silent coverage gap.
close_reason: Triaged 65 total skips across 7 files. 16 env-gate skips (correct, intentional). 5 conditional runtime skips (acceptable, highlight seed gap). 4 hard-coded stale skips in 18-admin-regressions: 3 config-dialog premise stale post-d809671f refactor (filed 4n6), 1 needs data. Category B skips will resolve once pnpm db:seed:clean runs in CI with 2567/1 + 2568 data.

title: Re-enable arrangement undo/redo or remove dead UI
description: HeaderClient.tsx:210 has TODO 'Re-enable when arrangement store supports undo/redo/save'. Buttons not rendered. Either complete store support and wire UI, or remove dead code + TODO. Decide direction with PM before coding.
close_reason: Chose option A: removed ~80 lines of broken history scaffolding (wrong snapshot scope, pushHistory never called). TODO comment removed from HeaderClient.

title: Remove legacy config edit flow; make config page read-only with Edit dialog
description: config/page.tsx calls createConfigAction (JSON-only, no timeslot regen). The new flow (ConfigureTimeslotsDialog → createTimeslotsAction) is correct. Remove the legacy save form from config page. Make it read-only display. Add Edit button that opens ConfigureTimeslotsDialog in edit mode, wired to updateConfigWithTimeslotsAction (atomic delete+regen timeslots in transaction).

description: After d809671f (config page read-only + Edit dialog, 2026-04-28), 18-admin-regressions.spec.ts:42-70 looks for 'ตั้งค่าตาราง' button on dashboard that opened an inline config dialog. That UI no longer exists. Test needs rewrite to: go to /schedule/year/sem/config, click the Edit button, verify ConfigureTimeslotsDialog opens with time inputs. Also 18-admin-regressions.spec.ts:93-106 (arrange time-row) may be valid but needs data; verify with seeded DB before unskipping.

title: Update or archive stale plans in docs/plans
description: docs/plans/2026-02-24-full-quality-pass-plan.md describes 35 P0 bugs already fixed in commits 94735861, 412b8f93. Plan not updated post-execution — misleads future readers. Sweep all docs/plans/*.md, mark completed plans as Done with commit refs, archive or delete fully shipped plans. prisma/migrations/PREVIEW_auth_migration.sql also lingering preview migration to clean.

title: Clean up 35 lint warnings (hooks deps, unused vars, console.log)
description: 0 errors but 35 warnings: 7 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, 6 unused-vars, 1 no-unsafe-function-type (Counter.tsx), 12 stray console.log in feature code, plus misc. Sweep file-by-file. Lower CI noise floor so future warnings stand out.
close_reason: All 24 lint warnings resolved: 0 errors 0 warnings. SelectMultipleTimeSlot refactored to useMemo, ProfilePage dead EmailSection removed, 12 other files cleaned.
